sections.paragraph:
ἀξιόω [ἄξιος]

—1. ‘deem worthy of special recognition or consideration’, consider, account/treat as worthy Lk 7:7; 2 Th 1:11; 1 Ti 5:17; Hb 3:3; 10:29.

—2. ‘arrive at a positive decision to proceed with an action on the basis of its merit’, think fit, consider appropriate Ac 15:38; 28:22. In similar vein, with component of expectation, as v.l. in 13:42f.
